stemHtml: The aircraft DME receiver is able to accept replies to its own transmissions and reject replies to other aircraft interrogations because..

options.a: the time interval between pulse pairs is unique to that particular aircraft.
options.b: aircraft interrogation signals and transponder responses are 63 MHz removed from each other.
options.c: transmission frequencies are 63 MHz different for each aircraft.
options.d: pulse pairs are amplitude modulated with the aircraft registration.
